title: java-source-resource-rules
text: Java source and resource rules. Java classes belong in src/main/java under a folder path matching their package declaration. Runtime resource files belong in src/main/resources and are usually loaded from the classpath, not by hardcoded source-tree paths. Test classes belong in src/test/java and usually mirror the package of the production class under test. Test fixtures belong in src/test/resources. Keep platform-specific paths out of core logic when possible; use Path, Paths, Files, and classpath resource loading.
